data.title: Meta Announces Llama 3.3 70B That Outperforms OpenAI's GPT-4o, Google's Gemini, and Amazon's AI Models
data.description: Meta's Llama 3.3 70B is an advanced AI model that delivers the performance of its larger predecessors at reduced costs, outperforming competitors like Google, OpenAI, and Amazon.

data.title: SMCI Stock Surges 9% In After-Market Hours As Company Gets Extension To File Annual Report
data.description: Super Micro Computer stock surged nearly 9% in after-market hours trading after the company received an extension from Nasdaq.

data.title: NASA Mission To Land Humans On Moon Delayed: Artemis 3 Now Slated For Mid-2027
data.description: NASA postpones 2 Artemis missions, including one to land humans on Moon in 2026 & 2027 due to issues with Orion spacecraft. Crew will now fly in 2026.

data.title: Michael Saylor Says His Bitcoin Strategy Is Simple: 'Just Keep Buying BTC With Your Spare Capital'
data.description: Bitcoin's (CRYPTO: BTC) value has reached an unprecedented milestone, crossing the $100,000 mark.

data.title: SpaceX Tests Starship Booster Ahead Of Next Flight: Will The 7th Test Happen Before End Of 2024?
data.description: SpaceX is preparing for another test flight of its Starship launch vehicle, possibly before the end of the year. The company has moved the booster to the launch pad for testing and has conducted six test flights so far.
